ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the exchange is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the instrument */,
  "last_traded_volume" REAL /* Last traded volume of the instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument for which the data applies */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the market data is from */,
  "source_feed" TEXT /* Source of the data feed */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Bid price of the instrument */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Ask price of the instrument */,
  "bid_volume" REAL /* Bid volume of the instrument */,
  "ask_volume" REAL /* Ask volume of the instrument */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Current trading status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the client (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client's company */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the client's account is active */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client accessing the platform */,
  "access_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the client (e.g., login, logout, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the client accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client's browser or application */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the client's access */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client executing the query */,
  "query_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution */,
  "query_result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query result */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query for which the result applies */,
  "result_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data resulting from the query */,
  "result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the result data */,
  "result_format" TEXT /* Format of the result data */,
  "result_duration" REAL /* Duration of the result generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical result */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument for which the analysis applies */,
  "analytics_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the analysis */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Data resulting from the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "analysis_duration" REAL /* Duration of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_duration" REAL /* Duration of the notification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
